package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_contains_retry_or_backoff_orchestration: Handlers that implement retry loops or backoff decisions inline instead of delegating to service or client layers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule043NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule043NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule043NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario043Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule043NegativeService, input Rule043NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
